name: crash-blocked-by-accretion
description: Same CRASH-regime buy proposal as crash-without-accretion-leaks-buy.json, but THIS time an UNCONFIRMED 'PAUSE BUYS in CRASH' accretion exists in scope. Proposed position $50 > threshold $25 (max(floor×2=20, 25)) → soft-conflict policy=pause → final_verdict=operator_required. This is the paired fixture showing the bridge closed: the dashboard surfaces the unconfirmed accretion, the operator promotes it, future debates cite it as a confirmed prior and the loop is closed.

accretions.fact: PAUSE BUYS during CRASH regime conf>=0.8 — coach proposed after 3 consecutive losing trades in last CRASH window
